items.title: Apple’s CarPlay AI Push And Q.AI Deal Meet Stretch Valuation Concerns
items.description: Apple (NasdaqGS:AAPL) is opening CarPlay to third-party AI chatbots, including ChatGPT, Google Gemini and Anthropic's Claude. The company is also acquiring Israeli AI startup Q.AI to support its efforts in automotive and conversational AI. Apple is entering a major partnership with Google aimed at strengthening Siri with advanced AI capabilities. For you as an investor, these moves touch two areas that are getting a lot of attention in consumer tech: the car and the voice assistant. Apple...

items.title: Dow Jones Futures: Nvidia, AMD, Tesla, Broadcom, Apple Are Big Movers
items.description: Dow Jones Futures: Nvidia stock, Tesla, Apple, Broadcom and Advanced Micro Devices were big movers during Monday's trading session.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Up As Oracle Soars; Cathie Wood Buys Buffett Stock Amid 145% Run (Live Coverage)
items.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index rose as Nvidia shined. Oracle soared and Cathie Wood bought a Warren Buffett stock. Hims & Hers stock dived.

items.title: How the Dow Got to 50000, in Charts
items.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average topped 50000 for the first time on Friday.  In a tech-dominated market, some surprising stocks powered the climb.  Here is a look at the stocks leading the latest leg higher—and the ones slowing things down.

items.title: Risk Is Back On. The Nasdaq Is Up 1.2%.
items.description: Risk was back on in a big way again on Monday. The S&P 500 rallied 0.7%. The Nasdaq Composite gained 1.2%. The Dow rose 54 points, or 0.1%. The Russell 2000 was up 0.9%.  Tech was the top performing sector, while momentum, risk, and growth-focused exchange-traded funds shined.
